title: Pterocarpus amoenus
taxonomy: Pterocarpus amoenus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is further classified within the genus Pterocarpus, which includes several other species of trees and shrubs. Pterocarpus amoenus is native to tropical Africa, and its classification as a legume reflects its unique characteristics and growth habits. As a member of the Fabaceae family, Pterocarpus amoenus is closely related to other plants such as beans, peas, and lentils. The plant's classification is an essential aspect of understanding its evolution, growth patterns, and potential uses.
